query: What are the major phases, decision points and associated fees, if any, in the NYISO generation interconnection cluster study process?
final_answer:
# NYISO Generation Interconnection Cluster Study Process: Phases, Decision Points & Fees

## Overview

Effective May 2, 2024, the NYISO's **Standard Interconnection Procedures (SIP)** — codified in **Attachment HH** to the NYISO Open Access Transmission Tariff (OATT) — replaced the prior Large Facility and Small Generator Interconnection Procedures with a unified "first-ready, first-served" **Cluster Study Process**.[^1] The process applies to all Generating Facilities (including those ≤20 MW), Cluster Study Transmission Projects, and CRIS-Only projects. The first iteration, the **Transition Cluster Study**, opened its Application Window on August 1, 2024.[^2]

The total timeline is approximately **~569 calendar days (≈1.6 years)** from Application Window through the iterative Final Decision Period, with new clusters commencing roughly every 18 months.[^3]

---

## Phase-by-Phase Breakdown

### 1. PRE-APPLICATION (Optional)

| Element | Detail |
|---------|--------|
| **Heatmap** | Publicly available interactive map showing estimated incremental injection capacity available at transmission nodes. Updated within 30 days of each Cluster Study completion. |
| **Pre-Application Report** | An entity may request a Pre-Application Report for information about a proposed interconnection before entering a Cluster Study. |

**Fees:** No mandatory fees at this stage (Pre-Application Report fees set per NYISO procedures).

---

### 2. APPLICATION WINDOW — 45 Calendar Days (75 for Transition Cluster)

This is the formal entry point. The Interconnection Customer must submit all required materials **during** this window.[^4]

**Key Requirements and Associated Fees:**

| Requirement | Fee/Deposit | Notes |
|-------------|-------------|-------|
| **Non-refundable Application Fee** | **$10,000** (cash only) | $5,000 for CRIS-Only Requests |
| **Study Deposit (SD)** | Based on project size (see table below) | Cash or Letter of Credit |
| **Site Control Demonstration** | — | Must demonstrate site control per NYISO Technical Bulletin #260 |
| **Conceptual one-line diagram & project layout** | — | Showing POI, electrical components, etc. |
| **Workable project models** | — | Short-circuit, steady-state, stability |
| **IBR Attestation** (if >20 MW inverter-based) | — | Per NYSRC Reliability Rule B.5 (IEEE 2800-2022) |

**Study Deposit Amounts by Project Size:**[^5]

| Project Size | Study Deposit |
|-------------|---------------|
| < 80 MW | **$100,000** |
| ≥80 MW and <200 MW | **$150,000** |
| ≥200 MW | **$250,000** |
| CRIS-Only | **$50,000** |

**NYISO Validation:** 5 Business Days (10 for Transition) to validate application. Developers have 10 Business Days (15 for Transition) to cure deficiencies. Failure to cure = withdrawal.[^3]

---

### 3. CUSTOMER ENGAGEMENT WINDOW — 70 Calendar Days (90 for Transition)

After the Application Window closes, the following occur:[^6]

1. **Cluster Member List Published** — within 10 Business Days. Limited POI changes allowed within 5 BDs of list posting.
2. **Physical Infeasibility Screening** — Connecting Transmission Owner (CTO) assesses whether proposed interconnections are physically feasible. Projects deemed physically infeasible cannot proceed.
3. **Scoping Meeting** — A group meeting for the entire Cluster.

---

### 4. DECISION POINT 1: PHASE 1 ENTRY DECISION PERIOD — 5 Business Days

At the conclusion of the Customer Engagement Window, each Interconnection Customer must elect whether to:

- **Proceed** to Phase 1 Study, **posting Readiness Deposit 1 (RD1)**, or
- **Withdraw** from the Queue (subject to Withdrawal Penalty WP1)

---

### 5. PHASE 1 STUDY — 190 Calendar Days[^7]

Performed **individually** for each project (except CRIS-Only projects). The CTO and Affected Transmission Owners (ATOs) identify and cost-estimate:

- **Connecting Transmission Owner's Attachment Facilities (CTOAFs)**
- **Distribution Upgrades**
- **Local System Upgrade Facilities (Local SUFs)**

Includes design, preliminary engineering, and cost/time estimation. Concludes with the **ISO Operating Committee's approval of the Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report**.

---

### 6. DECISION POINT 2: PHASE 2 ENTRY DECISION PERIOD — 10 Business Days

Each Interconnection Customer must elect whether to:

- **Proceed** to Phase 2 Study, **posting Readiness Deposit 2 (RD2)**, or
- **Withdraw** from the Queue (subject to Withdrawal Penalty WP2)

---

### 7. PHASE 2 STUDY — 270 Calendar Days[^7]

Performed **collectively** for all Cluster Study Projects. Includes:

- **Cluster Baseline Assessment (CBA)** — evaluates the pre-existing baseline system
- **Cluster Project Assessment (CPA)** — evaluates system with all Cluster projects added
- **NYISO Minimum Interconnection Standard** analysis — identifies **System Upgrade Facilities (SUFs)** and Distribution Upgrades for reliable interconnection (ERIS)
- **Cluster Study Deliverability Study** — for projects requesting CRIS, identifies **System Deliverability Upgrades (SDUs)**
- **Cost allocation** among contributing projects
- Option for an **Additional SDU Study** if new SDUs are identified

Concludes with **ISO Operating Committee's approval of the Cluster Study Report**.

---

### 8. DECISION POINT 3: FINAL DECISION PERIOD — Iterative Rounds

Each Interconnection Customer elects through **iterative decision rounds** whether to:[^8]

- **Accept** its Project Cost Allocation and **pay cash or post Security** (100% of cost estimate for SUFs, SDUs, and CTOAFs), or
- **Withdraw** (subject to Withdrawal Penalty WP3)

Projects that accept proceed to **negotiation of a Standard Interconnection Agreement (SIA)** and any required construction agreements.[^8]

---

## Summary of Deposits, Security, and Withdrawal Penalties

### Readiness Deposits & Security

| Stage | Amount | Applies To |
|-------|--------|------------|
| **RD1** | **$4,000/MW** | All projects except CRIS-Only |
| **RD2** | **Greater of:** (i) RD1 ($4,000/MW), or (ii) **20%** of Phase 1 cost estimate for Local SUFs and CTOAFs | All projects except CRIS-Only |
| **Security** | **100%** of cost estimate of SUFs, SDUs, and CTOAFs identified in Phase 1 & Phase 2 | All projects proceeding past Final Decision |

### Withdrawal Penalties

| Penalty | Formula | Exceptions |
|---------|---------|------------|
| **WP1** | **25% of Study Deposit (SD)** | (i) $5,000 if interconnection is physically infeasible; (ii) **$0** if project withdraws within 5 BDs of cluster member list posting |
| **WP2** | **50% of SD + 10% of RD1** | If interconnection physically infeasible → only 25% of SD |
| **WP3** | **100% of SD + 20% of RD2** | (i) If physically infeasible → only 50% of SD; (ii) If >50% increase in total cost estimate between Phase 1 & Phase 2 (excluding SDU costs) → only 100% of SD |

**Security Forfeiture:** Up to 100% of posted Security may be forfeited if other projects rely on upgrades identified for the withdrawing project.[^5]

---

## Process Flow Diagram (Simplified)

```
Heatmap / Pre-App Report (Optional)
        ↓
APPLICATION WINDOW (45 days)  ←  $10K App Fee + Study Deposit + Site Control
        ↓
CUSTOMER ENGAGEMENT WINDOW (70 days)  ←  Physical Infeasibility Screen + Scoping Meeting
        ↓
DECISION PERIOD 1 (5 BDs)  ←  WP1 if withdraw; post RD1 to proceed
        ↓
PHASE 1 STUDY (190 days)  ←  CTOAFs, Local SUFs, Distribution Upgrades
        ↓
DECISION PERIOD 2 (10 BDs)  ←  WP2 if withdraw; post RD2 to proceed
        ↓
PHASE 2 STUDY (270 days)  ←  SUFs, SDUs, CBA/CPA, cost allocation
        ↓
FINAL DECISION PERIOD (iterative)  ←  WP3 if withdraw; post Security to proceed
        ↓
STANDARD INTERCONNECTION AGREEMENT NEGOTIATION
```

---

## Quick-Reference Fee Table

| Fee Type | Amount |
|----------|--------|
| Application Fee (Interconnection Request) | **$10,000** (non-refundable) |
| Application Fee (CRIS-Only) | **$5,000** (non-refundable) |
| Study Deposit (<80 MW) | **$100,000** |
| Study Deposit (≥80 to <200 MW) | **$150,000** |
| Study Deposit (≥200 MW) | **$250,000** |
| Study Deposit (CRIS-Only) | **$50,000** |
| RD1 | **$4,000/MW** |
| RD2 | Greater of $4,000/MW or 20% of Phase 1 cost estimate |
| Security | 100% of identified SUF/SDU/CTOAF cost estimates |

---

[^1]: NYISO OATT Attachment HH, Section 40.2. Effective May 2, 2024. [NYISO Tariff — OATT Attachment HH](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/44769082/OATT%252040.2.pdf/7f52dd6a-784b-4f77-4ffd-4c7d692a7892)

[^2]: NYISO Notice of Transition Cluster Study Application Window, July 1, 2024. [Link](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/1396587/Notice-of-the-Transition-Cluster-Study-Application-Window.pdf/ebbdb6b8-5cdd-f9fc-db90-adf2a107bb0d)

[^3]: NYISO Order No. 2023 Compliance Presentation, IITF, December 1, 2023. [Link](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/41551475/Order%2520No.%25202023%2520Compliance%2520Plan_IITF_20231201_FINAL.pdf/bc837778-027a-4c43-8a51-2a20a8d9e54b)

[^4]: NYISO OATT Attachment HH, Section 40.5.4.

[^5]: NYISO Cluster Study Process Overview Figure, December 14, 2023 OC Meeting. [Link](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/41716870/07b_NYISO%20Cluster%20Study%20Process%20Overview%20Figure_OC_30231214.pdf/32e9bee3-0b04-c9d1-9fbe-8ca4e70d614e)

[^6]: NYISO OATT Attachment HH, Sections 40.7.1–40.7.6.

[^7]: Transition Cluster Study 2024 – Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report, October 31, 2025, Section 1.1. [Link](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/54804583/03_Phase%201%20CTO%20Summary%20Report%20TPAS_OC%20Posting.pdf/ead70e43-a36c-152d-c793-5d8d20339b85); NYISO OATT Attachment HH, Section 40.9.2.

[^8]: NYISO OATT Attachment HH, Section 40.15 (Final Decision Period) and Section 40.21 (Negotiation of Interconnection and Construction Agreements). Also: [NYISO SIP FAQ](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/49802416/NYISOs-Standard-Interconnection-Procedures-FAQ.pdf/a2fdffd3-7103-2b75-865b-782d83522323)

steps.reasoning: The user is asking about the NYISO (New York Independent System Operator) generation interconnection cluster study process, including major phases, decision points, and associated fees. Let me search for this information comprehensively.

steps.content:
# NYISO Generation Interconnection Cluster Study Process: Phases, Decision Points & Fees

## Overview

Effective May 2, 2024, the NYISO's **Standard Interconnection Procedures (SIP)** — codified in **Attachment HH** to the NYISO Open Access Transmission Tariff (OATT) — replaced the prior Large Facility and Small Generator Interconnection Procedures with a unified "first-ready, first-served" **Cluster Study Process**.[^1] The process applies to all Generating Facilities (including those ≤20 MW), Cluster Study Transmission Projects, and CRIS-Only projects. ## Phase-by-Phase Breakdown

### 1. PRE-APPLICATION (Optional)

| Element | Detail |
|---------|--------|
| **Heatmap** | Publicly available interactive map showing estimated incremental injection capacity available at transmission nodes. Updated within 30 days of each Cluster Study completion. |
| **Pre-Application Report** | An entity may request a Pre-Application Report for information about a proposed interconnection before entering a Cluster Study. |

**Fees:** No mandatory fees at this stage (Pre-Application Report fees set per NYISO procedures).

---

### 2. APPLICATION WINDOW — 45 Calendar Days (75 for Transition Cluster)

| Requirement | Fee/Deposit | Notes |

| **Non-refundable Application Fee** | **$10,000** (cash only) | $5,000 for CRIS-Only Requests |
| **Study Deposit (SD)** | Based on project size (see table below) | Cash or Letter of Credit |
| **Site Control Demonstration** | — | Must demonstrate site control per NYISO Technical Bulletin #260 |
| **Conceptual one-line diagram & project layout** | — | Showing POI, electrical components, etc. |
| **Workable project models** | — | Short-circuit, steady-state, stability |
| **IBR Attestation** (if >20 MW inverter-based) | — | Per NYSRC Reliability Rule B.5 (IEEE 2800-2022) |

**Study Deposit Amounts by Project Size:**[^5]

| Project Size | Study Deposit |
|-------------|---------------|
| < 80 MW | **$100,000** |
| ≥80 MW and <200 MW | **$150,000** |
| ≥200 MW | **$250,000** |
| CRIS-Only | **$50,000** |

**NYISO Validation:** 5 Business Days (10 for Transition) to validate application. Developers have 10 Business Days (15 for Transition) to cure deficiencies. Failure to cure = withdrawal.[^3]

After the Application Window closes, the following occur:[^6]

- **Proceed** to Phase 1 Study, **posting Readiness Deposit 1 (RD1)**, or

### 5. PHASE 1 STUDY — 190 Calendar Days[^7]

Performed **individually** for each project (except CRIS-Only projects). The CTO and Affected Transmission Owners (ATOs) identify and cost-estimate:

- **Connecting Transmission Owner's Attachment Facilities (CTOAFs)**
- **Distribution Upgrades**
- **Local System Upgrade Facilities (Local SUFs)**

Includes design, preliminary engineering, and cost/time estimation. Concludes with the **ISO Operating Committee's approval of the Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report**.

---

### 6. DECISION POINT 2: PHASE 2 ENTRY DECISION PERIOD — 10 Business Days

Each Interconnection Customer must elect whether to:

- **Proceed** to Phase 2 Study, **posting Readiness Deposit 2 (RD2)**, or
- **Withdraw** from the Queue (subject to Withdrawal Penalty WP2)

### 7. PHASE 2 STUDY — 270 Calendar Days[^7]

Performed **collectively** for all Cluster Study Projects. Includes:

- **Cluster Project Assessment (CPA)** — evaluates system with all Cluster projects added

### Readiness Deposits & Security

| Stage | Amount | Applies To |
|-------|--------|------------|
| **RD1** | **$4,000/MW** | All projects except CRIS-Only |
| **RD2** | **Greater of:** (i) RD1 ($4,000/MW), or (ii) **20%** of Phase 1 cost estimate for Local SUFs and CTOAFs | All projects except CRIS-Only |
| **Security** | **100%** of cost estimate of SUFs, SDUs, and CTOAFs identified in Phase 1 & Phase 2 | All projects proceeding past Final Decision |

| Penalty | Formula | Exceptions |

| **WP2** | **50% of SD + 10% of RD1** | If interconnection physically infeasible → only 25% of SD |

## Process Flow Diagram (Simplified)

```
Heatmap / Pre-App Report (Optional)
        ↓
APPLICATION WINDOW (45 days)  ←  $10K App Fee + Study Deposit + Site Control
        ↓
CUSTOMER ENGAGEMENT WINDOW (70 days)  ←  Physical Infeasibility Screen + Scoping Meeting
        ↓
DECISION PERIOD 1 (5 BDs)  ←  WP1 if withdraw; post RD1 to proceed
        ↓
PHASE 1 STUDY (190 days)  ←  CTOAFs, Local SUFs, Distribution Upgrades
        ↓
DECISION PERIOD 2 (10 BDs)  ←  WP2 if withdraw; post RD2 to proceed
        ↓
PHASE 2 STUDY (270 days)  ←  SUFs, SDUs, CBA/CPA, cost allocation
        ↓
FINAL DECISION PERIOD (iterative)  ←  WP3 if withdraw; post Security to proceed
        ↓
STANDARD INTERCONNECTION AGREEMENT NEGOTIATION
```

---

## Quick-Reference Fee Table

| Fee Type | Amount |
|----------|--------|
| Application Fee (Interconnection Request) | **$10,000** (non-refundable) |
| Application Fee (CRIS-Only) | **$5,000** (non-refundable) |
| Study Deposit (<80 MW) | **$100,000** |
| Study Deposit (≥80 to <200 MW) | **$150,000** |
| Study Deposit (≥200 MW) | **$250,000** |
| Study Deposit (CRIS-Only) | **$50,000** |
| RD1 | **$4,000/MW** |
| RD2 | Greater of $4,000/MW or 20% of Phase 1 cost estimate |
| Security | 100% of identified SUF/SDU/CTOAF cost estimates |

---

[^1]: NYISO OATT Attachment HH, Section 40.2. Effective May 2, 2024. [NYISO Tariff — OATT Attachment HH](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/44769082/OATT%252040.2.pdf/7f52dd6a-784b-4f77-4ffd-4c7d692a7892)

[^2]: NYISO Notice of Transition Cluster Study Application Window, July 1, 2024. [Link](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/1396587/Notice-of-the-Transition-Cluster-Study-Application-Window.pdf/ebbdb6b8-5cdd-f9fc-db90-adf2a107bb0d)

[^3]: NYISO Order No. 2023 Compliance Presentation, IITF, December 1, 2023. [Link](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/41551475/Order%2520No.%25202023%2520Compliance%2520Plan_IITF_20231201_FINAL.pdf/bc837778-027a-4c43-8a51-2a20a8d9e54b)

[^4]: NYISO OATT Attachment HH, Section 40.5.4.

[^5]: NYISO Cluster Study Process Overview Figure, December 14, 2023 OC Meeting. [Link](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/41716870/07b_NYISO%20Cluster%20Study%20Process%20Overview%20Figure_OC_30231214.pdf/32e9bee3-0b04-c9d1-9fbe-8ca4e70d614e)

[^6]: NYISO OATT Attachment HH, Sections 40.7.1–40.7.6.

[^7]: Transition Cluster Study 2024 – Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report, October 31, 2025, Section 1.1. [Link](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/54804583/03_Phase%201%20CTO%20Summary%20Report%20TPAS_OC%20Posting.pdf/ead70e43-a36c-152d-c793-5d8d20339b85); NYISO OATT Attachment HH, Section 40.9.2.

[^8]: NYISO OATT Attachment HH, Section 40.15 (Final Decision Period) and Section 40.21 (Negotiation of Interconnection and Construction Agreements). Also: [NYISO SIP FAQ](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/49802416/NYISOs-Standard-Interconnection-Procedures-FAQ.pdf/a2fdffd3-7103-2b75-865b-782d83522323)
